purpose: Text embedding for voice profile matching and query-text speaker features
attribution: Derived from Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding; quantized via elizaOS/llama.cpp fork
notes: Used by InMemoryVoiceProfileStore for query-text feature extraction alongside the speaker encoder (acoustic embeddings). Available on 4b+ tiers only (small tiers lack capacity for a separate embedding model). Shares the llama.cpp process with the text LM via the multi-context API.
